steps.title: Connect the question to haziness
steps.content: The underlined sentence asks what the concept of “culture” includes. It illustrates the author’s point that the concept is hazy and difficult to define, with no settled boundary in an academic research context.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: Choice A treats the sentence as a list of settled components, but it is a question. Choice B invents a specialists-versus-nonspecialists disagreement. Choice C wrongly attributes the question to Velasquez and Price. The sentence illustrates a definitional difficulty that the author says holds sociology back. The answer is D.
